ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fixtures" (
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fixture */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the match */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, tournament, friendly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fixture (e.g., scheduled, in-play, completed) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match is taking place */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., football, basketball) */,
  "league" TEXT /* League or tournament in which the fixture is taking place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixtures_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixtures_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odds" (
  "odd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odd */,
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fixture the odd belongs to */,
  "odd_type" TEXT /* Type of odd (e.g., fixed odds, parlay) */,
  "odd_value" TEXT /* Value of the odd */,
  "odd_format" TEXT /* Format of the odd (e.g., decimal, fractional) */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport for the odds */,
  "league" TEXT /* League or tournament for the odds */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the odds were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_fixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("fixture_id") REFERENCES fixtures ("fixture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "account_balance" TEXT /* Current balance in the user's account */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user's account is verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "picks" (
  "pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pick */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the pick */,
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fixture the pick belongs to */,
  "odd_id" INTEGER /* ID of the odd the pick is based on */,
  "pick" TEXT /* Pick made by the user (e.g., team name, draw) */,
  "stake" TEXT /* Stake amount for the pick */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet (e.g., fixed odds, parlay) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pick (e.g., pending, settled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pick was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pick was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_picks_fixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("fixture_id") REFERENCES fixtures ("fixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_picks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_picks_odd_id FOREIGN KEY ("odd_id") REFERENCES odds ("odd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fixture the result belongs to */,
  "team1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "team2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "final_result" TEXT /* Final result of the match (e.g., team1 win, team2 win, draw) */,
  "profit" TEXT /* Profit or loss for users who made picks */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_fixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("fixture_id") REFERENCES fixtures ("fixture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the history belongs to */,
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fixture the history belongs to */,
  "pick" TEXT /* Pick made by the user */,
  "stake" TEXT /* Stake amount for the pick */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "profit" TEXT /* Profit or loss for the user */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport for the bet */,
  "league" TEXT /* League or tournament for the bet */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet (e.g., fixed odds, parlay) */,
  "odd_value" TEXT /* Value of the odds at the time of the bet */,
  "odd_format" TEXT /* Format of the odds (e.g., decimal, fractional) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the bet was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the bet was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_history_fixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("fixture_id") REFERENCES fixtures ("fixture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the entry belongs to */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "total_profit" TEXT /* Total profit for the user */,
  "total_bets" INTEGER /* Total number of bets made by the user */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of winning bets made by the user */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losing bets made by the user */,
  "win_rate" TEXT /* Win rate of the user (percentage) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the leaderboard entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the leaderboard entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team is from */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
